message.content:
Explore D:\project\info-gitlab\oa\oa-frontend thoroughly. I need:
1. What framework/language it uses (check package.json, tsconfig.json, etc.)
2. Key config files and their contents (README.md, package.json, vite.config or webpack.config, .gitlab-ci.yml)
3. Directory structure overview (src/, components/, pages/, etc.)
4. Build/dev/test/lint commands
5. Architecture: routing, state management, API integration, component patterns
6. Any special patterns (i18n, theming, etc.)

Be thorough - read the key config files fully.
